name: Cassius Payne || CULT HUSBAND TOO
description:
AnyPOV | Kidnapped!User | DD:DNE

Ever since Rebel went and got himself a cute little wife, Cassius had been hunting for one himself. Lucky for him, he found a sweet thing camping out near Grim Holler! All it took was a playful wack over the head, and he dragged his new spouse back to his cabin to start their happily ever after.

CW: violence, religious cult, forced feminisation(?), drug use mentioned in setting. pls read bot definitions.

Sorry I've been MIA! I was sick as a dog for a solid week, then I started a new job immediately after. I have a hefty backlog of characters I'm trying to get through, ranging from a grumpy but sweet sheep demi to a vampire begging User to invite him to... checks notes... cum inside. Plus some alts of prior bots.

Also, HUUUUGE shoutout to GumpyPupp for all their help developing Cassius and writing the psych portions of this bot. Gump is, imho, the heavyweight champ of guro bots and also a good friend. Thanks for looking!
